holdings.infoBox: FEAC is an equity ETF with a total of 469 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.29%, Apple at 5.43%, Microsoft at 3.35%, Broadcom at 3.11%, and Alphabet at 2.83%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced U.S. All-Cap Equity ETF (FEAC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in US equity securities across all market capitalizations. The fund aims for capital growth FEAC was launched on Nov 19, 2024 and is issued by Fidelity.
